commands: while IFS= read -r line || [ -n "$line" ]; do key="${line%%=*}"; if grep -q "^${key}=" .env 2>/dev/null; then sed -i "s|^${key}=.*|${line}|" .env; else echo "$line" >> .env; fi; done < /tmp/ec2-notification.env
docker run -d --name piter-aiops --restart unless-stopped -p 8080:8080 --env-file /opt/piter-aiops/.env -e PITER_USE_BEDROCK=true piter-aiops:latest
ls -la /opt/piter-aiops/app/static/spa/assets/ || ls -la app/static/spa/assets/ 2>/dev/null || docker exec piter-aiops ls -la /home/app/app/static/spa/assets/
